books.title: The Jungle Book
books.author: Rudyard Kipling
books.description: Mowgli's wild adventures raised by wolves in the Indian jungle — a timeless tale of belonging and survival.

books.title: Charlotte's Web
books.author: E.B. White
books.description: A heartwarming story of friendship between Wilbur the pig and Charlotte the spider.

books.title: Matilda
books.author: Roald Dahl
books.description: A brilliant girl with magical powers navigates a world of awful adults and discovers the power of books.

books.title: The BFG
books.author: Roald Dahl
books.description: Sophie befriends the Big Friendly Giant, who catches dreams and blows them into children's bedrooms.

books.title: Pippi Longstocking
books.author: Astrid Lindgren
books.description: The world's strongest girl lives alone and cheerfully ignores all rules adults try to impose.

books.title: The Secret Garden
books.author: Frances H. Burnett
books.description: A hidden garden transforms three lonely children and teaches them the magic of nature and hope.

books.title: Harry Potter & the Philosopher's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: A boy discovers he's a wizard and enters a magical world of wonder, friendship, and danger.

books.title: Percy Jackson & the Lightning Thief
books.author: Rick Riordan
books.description: A boy discovers he's the son of a Greek god — and is immediately blamed for stealing Zeus's lightning bolt.

books.title: Holes
books.author: Louis Sachar
books.description: Boys at a strange detention camp dig holes in the desert every day — but the warden is looking for something.

books.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid
books.author: Jeff Kinney
books.description: Greg Heffley's hilariously honest diary of middle school survival.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A shepherd boy travels from Spain to Egypt in search of treasure and discovers his personal legend.

books.title: The Hunger Games
books.author: Suzanne Collins
books.description: Katniss volunteers for a televised survival contest where only one of 24 tributes can come home alive.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A young girl in the American South watches her father defend a Black man falsely accused of a crime.

books.title: Animal Farm
books.author: George Orwell
books.description: Farm animals overthrow their farmer in this sharp allegory about power, corruption, and revolution.

books.title: The Kite Runner
books.author: Khaled Hosseini
books.description: A powerful story of friendship, betrayal, and redemption set against the backdrop of Afghanistan's turbulent history.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A sweeping history of humankind — from the stone age through the agricultural, scientific, and digital revolutions.

books.title: The God of Small Things
books.author: Arundhati Roy
books.description: A Booker Prize-winning story of forbidden love and caste in Kerala, told with lyrical, unforgettable prose.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through tiny, compounding changes.
